programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 403
programme.desc: With twins in the mix, it's double trouble as bi-curious Deena pulls the robbery on both The Situation and Vinny. Plus, The Situation's 'secret hook-up' with Snooki is revealed. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: The boys harass Deena for stealing a girl from Vinny's bed. Ronnie & Sammi are back to their old ways, but this time The Situation is involved in their drama. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 405
programme.desc: After causing drama between Ronnie & Sammi for years, The Situation comes to blows with Ronnie. But with The Situation carried out on a stretcher, have things finally gone too far? (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinny put on a Guido-themed comedy show, while Ron and Sammi try to patch things up. Snooki is so distraught over her long-distance relationship that JWOWW and Sammi decide to intervene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: S4, Ep 7. When the roommates take a trip to the Italian Shore, Snooki & Deena party so hard they wind up in bed together. Whilst back in Florence, Team Meatball has a run-in with the Italian police.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: The boys spring Team Meatball from the police station after their accident. And when Snooki's boyfriend Jionni comes to visit, a romantic evening ends with Snooki sobbing alone on the street.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 409
programme.desc: Deena panics after missing her period. After an all-night fight with Jionni, Snookie decides to take a break from the relationship. Mike tries to win her over, but someone else ends up comforting her.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 410
programme.desc: After Mike's prank backfires, the guys visit Vinny's family in Sicily and the girls class it up on a Tuscan wine tour. Snooki learns the truth about her hook-up with Vin and must come clean to Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 411
programme.desc: Deena's still trying to 'do sex' with Pauly, the meatballs get an icy reception at a club, and the whole house turns on Mike after he stirs up drama one too many times. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 412
programme.desc: Mike's antics have proven too much and Ron demands he make amends. As the crew count down the days until their return to Seaside, Mike wonders whether or not to join them at the Shore. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 453
programme.desc: After a summer full of popping and breaking bottles, heartache, hookups, and car-crashing, wall-smashing drama, the cast reunite to open up old wounds and say goodbye to Florence.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The roommates return from Italy and couldn't be more excited to get back to the Jersey Shore. But a drama storm is brewing as Mike threatens to destroy Snooki's relationship with Jionni. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: Vinny weighs his options: Should he stay, or head home to Staten Island? Snooki fights with Jionni, and the roommates are back to their usual antics - partying and tanning to the extreme. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 503
programme.desc: The roommates struggle to adjust to life at the Shore without Vinny, while Mike confronts his own internal demons. But it's also Pauly's birthday and he gets the best present of his life! (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: Mike returns only to find out that Danny has threatened to get new roommates! The girls hire strippers for Pauly and Mike's wild birthday party whilst the roomies go to kidnap Vinny. (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 49
programme.desc: Krab Borg!/Rock A Bi-Valve: After watching a movie where robots take over the world, Spongebob thinks Mr. Krabs is a robot. Spongebob and Patrick find a baby clam and decide to raise it as their own

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 50
programme.desc: Wet Painters/Krusty Krab Training Video: Spongebob and Patrick must paint Mr. Krabs living room without getting a drop of paint on anything but the walls. Learn how to become a Krusty Krab employee in this episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 51
programme.desc: Spongebob decides to throw a big party after discovering a "how to throw a party" kit in the grocery store.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 52
programme.desc: To make some extra cash, Spongebob and Patrick decide to sell chocolate door to door./Barnacle Boy wants to be called "Barnacle Man" and rebels when everyone rejects his request.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 53
programme.desc: Patrick joins Ms. Puff's class but begins to get Spongebob in a lot of trouble causing him to lose gold stars./Mr. Krabs takes Spongebob and Squidward on a clam fishing trip.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 54
programme.desc: It is prehistoric Bikini Bottom, and we spend a day in the life of SpongeGar, Patar, and Squog. (Spongebob, Patrick, and Squidward's prehistoric alter-egos.)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 56
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets ill after eating an old Krabby Patty that he refused to throw away./SpongeBob has an accident while sand sledding! Afraid for his safety, he won't leave his house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 57
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs aims to squeeze every penny out of kids on summer break by building a playground in the Krusty Krab./SpongeBob and Patrick lure Squidward to their backyard campout.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 58
programme.desc: Spongebob desperately searches for his missing name tag./Plankton enlists his relatives to help him steal the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 59
programme.desc: SpongeBob is jellyfishing when he wistfully realizes that he wants to fly./Patchy the Pirate is set to present a never before seen episode of Spongebob with one problem - no tape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 60
programme.desc: SpongeBob catches someone littering and turns him in - but it's the Tattletale Strangler!/SpongeBob and Patrick invest in some magic "invisible spray" at the local prank shop.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 61
programme.desc: With the Krusty Krab's new "open 24 hours" policy, the employees must work 'round the clock./Mr. Krabs loses his shell right before a big reunion with his old buddies.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Plankton slips and falls on some water at the Krusty Krab and sues Mr. Krabs for not posting a wet floor sign./Spongebob buys Mr. Krabs a new mattress to help him sleep better.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 63
programme.desc: While trying to beat a world record, SpongeBob forgets to feed Gary - for several weeks. So Gary runs away to downtown Bikini Bottom where he is taken in by a kind old woman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 64
programme.desc: Squidward's lazy Sunday is constantly interrupted by Spongebob and Patrick's Good Neighbor Club activities./Squidward becomes obsessed with winning a prize from the Skill Crane.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 65
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sells the Krusty Krab to a conglomerate and explores the joys of retirement./Squidward tricks his neighbor into believing that Spongebob has a laugh-related illness.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 66
programme.desc: After a freak jousting accident at a Medieval Times restaurant, SpongeBob and Patrick are transported to a medieval version of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 67
programme.desc: SpongeBob sets out to make his own Mermaid Man movie using the original actors, fresh from the retirement home./Mr. Krabs is horrified to learn Plankton is dating his mother!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 68
programme.desc: Patrick gets hit in the head and comes to with superior intellect!/Sandy accidentally melds Spongebob and Squidward into one body when her teleportation device malfunctions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 69
programme.desc: In another one of his money-making schemes, Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into an upscale hotel./Mrs. Puff gets fired when the higher-ups learn of Spongebob's repeated failure.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 70
programme.desc: The Flying Dutchman crashes at SpongeBob's house where he constantly scares, startles, and surprises SpongeBob./Sandy is worried her inventions won't satisfy her chimp beneficiaries.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 71
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs tries to throw his daughter, Pearl, the best birthday ever./Spongebob competes on Karate Island for the title "King of Karate."

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 72
programme.desc: Spongebob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip to be replaced by Le Spatula./Mr. Krabs sends Spongebob down a wishing well to collect the coins dropped in by people making wishes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 74
programme.desc: Spongebob has never had a vacation. To save his job, Mr.Krabs gives him the day off! /Spongebob finds an old powdered wig in the trash and wears it thinking it's cool.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 75
programme.desc: When Squidward swallows his clarinet reed Sandy offers to retrieve the piece./A misunderstanding over an advertisement causes Patrick to think he must get out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 76
programme.desc: After a bike accident, Squidward is coated in so much mud that the residents of Bikini Bottom think he is a monster./ SpongeBob tries to impress Squidward with his new magic kit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 77
programme.desc: SpongeBob has failed his driving test - again. Pat is so outraged that he takes the test to prove that it is unfair, only he passes!/ Patrick discovers in a genealogy document that he is next in line to receive a kingly title!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 78
programme.desc: SpongeBob hears that a ferocious biker gang is coming to town, so SpongeBob prepares to protect the town all by himself./A new Kelp Smoothy chain is opening up all over Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 79
programme.desc: SpongeBob's favorite jellyfishing net is missing! And worst of all, Pat may have been the one that stole it./Rejected yet again by Squidward, SpongeBob decides that if he can't hang with the real Squid, he'll make his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 80
programme.desc: SpongeBob is going to have the best day ever. But when work, karate, jellyfishing, and Squidward's clarinet recital don't go as planned will his day be ruined?/ It's Best Friends Day so Patrick and SpongeBob trade presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 81
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for longer than anyone can remember. But one day, Mr. Krabs reveals that they were not always this way. There was a time when the two rivals were best friends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 82
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's old fry cook pays a special visit to the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob is in awe of his predecessor, who has since become a world-renowned chef./Tales of the boogeyman send SpongeBob into a panic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 83
programme.desc: We check on Patrick's morning routine in 'Rise and Shine', SpongeBob must be patient for his cereal-based entertainment in 'Waiting', and then in 'Fungus Among Us', SpongeBob develops a case of Ick!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 84
programme.desc: Mr Krabs is determined to uncover Plankton's next devious plot in 'Spy Buddies', we learn advanced boating techniques in 'Boat Smarts', and Mr Krabs holds a competition in 'Good Old Whatshisname'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 85
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab (so that he'll never be late again) in 'New Digs', and then in 'Krabs A La Mode', Plankton has an idea to cause some chilly trouble for Mr Krabs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 86
programme.desc: A scary roller coaster opens at Bikini Bottom's amusement park in 'Roller Cowards', then in 'Bucket Sweet Bucket', Plankton tricks SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward into fixing up the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 87
programme.desc: SpongeBob has trouble saying goodbye to the most perfect Krabby Patty he has ever cooked up in 'To Love A Patty', and then in 'Breath of Fresh Squidward', Squidward becomes the most jovial Squid ever!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 88
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wishes he could talk to money in 'Money Talks', and then in 'SpongeBob vs the Patty Gadget', SpongeBob battles a patty-making machine. Plus there's a dance contest in 'Slimy Dancing'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 89
programme.desc: A food critic gives SpongeBob high praise, and Mr Krabs takes advantage in 'The Krusty Sponge'. Then in 'Sing A Song Of Patrick', SpongeBob helps Patrick get his song some airplay on the radio.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 90
programme.desc: Sandy's Tree Dome has a flea problem in 'A Flea In Her Dome'. Patrick accidentally takes SpongeBob's donut and feels guilty in 'Donut of Shame', and SpongeBob is washing dishes in 'The Krusty Plate'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 91
programme.desc: Plankton turns everyone into babies in 'Goo Goo Gas', and then in 'Le Big Switch', SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef at a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 93
programme.desc: SpongeBob must stay clean for 'Picture Day' in boating school, Patrick eats for free in 'Pat No Pay', and then in 'Blackjack', SpongeBob must stand up to his nefarious cousin Blackjack.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 94
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally punches himself and gets a black eye in 'Blackened Sponge', while in 'Mermaid Man vs. SpongeBob', Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy are brainwashed by Plankton!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 95
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick board a ship of prisoners going to jail in 'The Inmates Of Summer', and then in 'To Save A Squirrel', SpongeBob and Patrick stow away on one of Sandy's wilderness expeditions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 96
programme.desc: Pest Of The West: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck. Hired as the sheriff of Dead Eye Gulch, he must reclaim the town from no-good Dead Eye Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 97
programme.desc: It's a battle of the restaurants in '20,000 Patties Under The Sea', and then in 'The Battle Of Bikini Bottom', Patrick and SpongeBob discover that they have very different views about cleanliness.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 98
programme.desc: WhoBob WhatPants?: SpongeBob gets a bump on the bonce and can't remember who he is. His friends back in Bikini Bottom, who once told him to get lost, soon find they're missing him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 99
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally messes up Squidward's face in 'The Two Faces Of Squidward', and then in 'Spongehenge', SpongeBob's sponge brings all the jellyfish to the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 100
programme.desc: SpongeBob's singing means no more Krabby Patties in 'Banned In Bikini Bottom'. Then in 'Stanley S. SquarePants', SpongeBob's cousin comes to visit, and quickly turns his life upside down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Squidward invites a TV show to visit his not exactly camera-ready home in 'House Fancy', then in 'Krabby Road', SpongeBob thinks that Plankton is trying to start a band. Which gives Plankton an idea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Mr Krabs can't believe that SpongeBob found a penny in 'Penny Foolish', and then in 'Nautical Novice', SpongeBob thinks of a new way to get his boating licence from Mrs. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Plankton replaces the Chum Bucket with a Roman coliseum (and togas!) in 'Spongicus', and then in 'Suctioncup Symphony', Squidward is sure to win a music contest - if SpongeBob and Patrick stay quiet!

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie and Marily are rivals in the small town of Meadow Ridge, their bakeries across the street from each other. Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.title: Love Is A Piece Of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie's a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: When Rose returns home to inherit her grandmother’s dress shop, she runs into her high school crush, Cole. They soon realize that just like the shop, their love deserves a second chance as well.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can’t refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla has it all figured out, a thriving career and a loving fiance. She co-hosts Wake Up Chicago with Derek. Sparks begin to fly between them when they become the unexpected guardians of a baby.

programme.title: 10 Truths About Love
programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A novelist falls in love with a retired Navy SEAL while writing her newest book.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking and optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show.

programme.title: A Match in Manhattan
programme.desc: When Celeste loses her job as a teacher, her boss puts her forward for an au pair job with a NY Property Tycoon. As she struggles with the children, can Celeste win over Richard and his children so she can keep her job, or maybe love has other plans...

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: Podcast host Samantha has an aversion to romance but is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. She then falls for charming Jake, who calls in with a problem she is determined to solve.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a rooftop garden with an old-school country boy to appease her boss's new passion for 'green' living and secure her promotion. But love may be in bloom.

programme.title: From Italy with Amore
programme.desc: When Ariel sees her dream man, she will stop at nothing to get to know him better. In her quest to see him again, she meets restaurateur Daniel, who shows her that food is the way to her heart.

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling keep their area free from "Space Invaders," nap hard after a "Slumber Punch," and see just how weird it gets when cats get their paws on "Too Much Nip."

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, and with a whole new stage, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling "Do It For The Vine", bust out their 3D glasses for the category "3Diculousness" and watch some old folks slam in the "Grey Games".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, basketball great Metta World Peace joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to play "Metta Ball," having a job when you're "Here For The Discount,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, business guru Marcus Lemonis shows us his "Lemonis Face", teaches us the 3Ps of "People, Process, Pain" and finally discovers that "They Do Exist!".

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling take the "Running Man Challenge," explore the fear known as "Crap-nophobia" and learn what it means to be "Saved To Death."

programme.desc: On an all-new remix episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo swap places as Chanel teaches that CUTE KILLS, Steelo warns about DEATH CARTS and Rob shows how people get down with PPP

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop legend DJ Paul joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get a little ZAP HAPPY, live the JUGG LIFE, and get energized by some BEATSPIRATION.

programme.desc: On a special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel get down with the bros as they view the world in BRO-MOTION, learn what it means to be BRO-PROOF, and study the special bro bond IN BRO WE TRUST.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 717
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning producer and DJ, Diplo, joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling save the day with "Peacekeepers," get crazy with "Mad Indecent Block Parties,"

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling spot some "Man Dolphins", hit some red "Bullseyes" and get wet in the category "Dammmmp Daniel."

programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through BLACK AND BLUE FRIDAY, GETTIN' UGLY with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some HUMAN DREIDELS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 809
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo fly solo as they learn how dangerous it is to be born with "Turtle Blood", get in shape with "Beast 90x" and learn the advantages to being 100% "Prank Proof".

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo choke down some STREET MEAT, party with a few SLITER SISTERS and hit the stairs with some extreme SLINKIES.

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have rapper/producer Sage the Gemini on the show to find out if he's "Glide Or Die," get "Over Gassed," and announce to the world "I Love Sparks!"

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 707
programme.desc: Red Man's Greed: When the entire town is bought out by a Native American casino, the boys come up with a plan to get their homes back - but is more gambling really the solution? (S7, E07)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: South Park is Gay! The TV show Queer Eye For The Straight Guy is sweeping the nation and the men of South Park are embracing metrosexuality, but what evil plan are the hosts plotting? (S7, E08)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: Christian Hard Rock: The boys form a band called Moop, but disagree on what direction they should take. Cartman leaves the band and bets them he will have a platinum record first! (S7, E09)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: Casa Bonita: Cartman is overjoyed at going to a Mexican restaurant for Kyle's birthday but is crushed when he finds out Butters is invited instead. He'll have to make Butters "disappear". (S7, E11)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 712
programme.desc: All About The Mormons: A new family moves to South Park and their son Gary is an unusually perfect Mormon - this angers the boys no end! Will Stan beat him up or go for a family dinner?! (S7, E12)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: Butt Out: When the boys' smoking leads to a nasty incident, it's the cigarettes that are blamed rather than them. Cue the glutinous Rob Reiner to arrive in town with his anti-smoking lobby! (S7, E13)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The children of South Park are attracted to "Mr. Jefferson," the new neighbor in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get "Mr. Jefferson" to love him best.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: You Got F'd in the A: The boys get 'served' by some kids from the O.C. so now 'it's on!'. Stan puts together a dance troupe who must compete in the dance-off. Will Randy's moves save them? (S8, E04)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After the sudden on-set of the disease Gingervitis, Cartman rallies all other ginger kids to rise up and assume their role as the master race.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park, and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed when his dad gets pulled over for drunk driving. Randy believes that only one thing can save him from his 'disease,' a bleeding statue of the Virgin Mary in the next town.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 905
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: Two Days Before The Day After Tomorrow: Stan and Cartman crash a speed boat into the world's largest beaver dam, flooding the town of Beaverton. Everyone's response is that of mass hysteria! (S9, E08)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 909
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 910
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 913
programme.desc: Free Willzyx: The boys are tricked into believing the killer whale at Sea Park is from the moon. How will Timmy's wheelchair, the Russian government and their skateboards help to free him? (S9, E13)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 914
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Towelie gets over his drug addiction and writes his memoirs. With Oprah's support, his book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: ManBearPig: Ex U.S. Vice President Al Gore visits South Park Elementary and warns the pupils about ManBearPig, a monster which is "half man, half bear and half pig" - you can't be "cereal"! (S10, E06)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Tsst: Cartman's mum realizes she can no longer control him, so attempts to get help from various reality TV experts. Only when she recruits the "Dog Whisperer" do results start to happen. (S10, E07)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1008
programme.desc: Make Love, Not Warcraft: The boys are all shades of mad when a 'griefer' repeatedly kills them in an online game. Some serious training is in order so they can defeat him and play the game! (S10, E08)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1010
programme.desc: Miss Teacher Bangs A Boy: Power goes to Cartman's head when he becomes "Dawg the Hallway Monitor". Meanwhile, Kyle is shocked to discover his little brother Ike and his teacher are at "it"! (S10, E10)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1011
programme.desc: Hell On Earth 2006: Satan has a Sweet 16 style party in L.A. on Halloween! The gang perform a ritual and manage to summon Biggie Smalls - who demands Butters helps him get to the party! (S10, E11)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1013
programme.desc: Go God Go XII: Cartman is stuck in the future, caught up in a battle between atheists and sea otters! And what will become of Richard Dawkins and Mrs. Garrison's love affair? (S10, E13)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1014
programme.desc: Stanley's Cup: In a parody of underdog sports films, Stan is sentenced to community service and ends up coaching the Park County Pee-Wee hockey team - can he turn these losers into winners? (S10, E14)

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After failing to show respect for their teacher, PC Principal revokes Pyjama Day privileges for the entire 4th grade class on the most important day of the year.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stan is horrified to realise that he's misinterpreted some of the greatest writing of all time and dedicates himself to curing his unconscious bias by reading The Lord of the Rings.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Cartman is furious with his mom when she tells him about her new job.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 4
programme.desc: With world tensions escalating, a lot is riding on Butterâ€™s ability to crush the Russian competition in the all-important Under 10s Dressage Championship.

programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy get jobs as fire dogs and save a cast full of characters during a 40-story building fire. After reading the story of the Littlest Giant'

programme.desc: Commander Hoek and Cadet Stimpy's rocket hurtles out of control and leaves them marooned on an eerie uncharted planet, where they attempt to find food and avoid the hideous Brainiac men.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: Daria joins Jake on a business trip where he tries to court a big-name client, and Helen tries to bond with Quinn at a sleepover.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: Daria dreams up a murder mystery at her school after Kevin and the football team are suspected of cheating on a test.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 10

programme.desc: Daria and Jane wonder if aliens have taken over their town after Secret Service agents urge the students at Lawndale High to report anyone who exhibits strange behaviors.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Grimes' judgmental mother rises from the dead, and a neglected Randall reconsiders his living situation.

programme.desc: Helen agrees to help her niece with her divorce, Jake leaves home to escape Helen and Aunt Rita's bickering, Daria avoids Tom, and Stacy and Tiffany face a fashion dilemma.

programme.desc: Daria and Jane's friendship is tested when Jane dates an opinionated guy with a love for everything vintage, and Upchuck tries his hand at magic.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stimpy's stupidity becomes too much for Ren and he leaves home to become a hermit. All alone, Ren begins to go crazy because he misses his true friend.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy find themselves in elf and gnome world where everyone happily works to graduate Pixie status. Stimpy loves his new work, but Ren thinks it's too hard and everyone is too happy.

programme.desc: Randall is infected by horrifying plants at sea when Twayne throws a cruise ship party.

programme.desc: The situation grows increasingly dire for everyone trapped in the van, and Foxxy is taken captive.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 306

programme.desc: Mark cares for an undocumented werewolf, and Leonard envies his famous magician brother, Christ Angel.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When the Morgendorffers move to Lawndale, bubbly younger daughter Quinn becomes instantly popular while her sarcastic sister Daria is told to work on her self-esteem.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 34
programme.desc: A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 35
programme.desc: A scientist arranges to have his human-looking robot pitch for the struggling local baseball team.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 36
programme.desc: A playwright makes characters come to life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A pilot of a downed WW II bomber comes to in the African desert and desperately tries to find out what happened to the rest of his crew.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Seeking refuge from a storm, traveler David Ellington comes upon a bizarre hermitage of monks, who have imprisoned a man who begs for his help. When David confronts the head monk Brother Jerome, he is told that the man is the devil, and David must decide

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A young woman lying in a hospital bed, her head wrapped in bandages, awaits the outcome of a surgical procedure performed by the State in a last-ditch attempt to make her look 'normal'.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag, he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan finds himself in the middle of another murder investigation that hits too close to home.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan finds himself in unfamiliar territory when a string of murders seem to be connected to a state of the art computer system and its not so stable inventor and owner Bruce Locatelli.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Mark and Steve return home from a fishing trip to a shocking discovery - the bloody and beaten body of Mickey, the young medical student who, along with his wife Jill, also a medical student, had been house-sitting for them.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Steve reluctantly goes on a dating game show and wins. Much to his pleasnat surprise, his date appears to be everything he's looking for and more.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Steve gets an unexpected phone call from Hawk, an old friend from the police force who has recently retired and moved into the Sunny Meadows rest home.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Marine Lt. Hank Thomas enters BBQ Bob's, the favorite lunchtime hangout of the doctors, wielding a gun in his left hand and threatening three other Marines who are already there.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Paraplegic, asthmatic game show contestant Sol Singer climbs into his specially-modified van and sets out to a TV studio where he is bout to compete on the live quiz show "Through the Roof."

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Dear friend and famous pop singer Danielle Marsh comes from new York to stay with Mark and Steve while she prepares for a big comeback conecrt.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 23
programme.desc: The murder of a young woman brings Alex into contact with her roommate Amy Saroyan, Alex's former girlfriend whom he has not seen in many years.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 24
programme.desc: While a deliriously happy Madison helps new love Brett Hayward move in with her, Steve investigates the brutal slaying of palastic surgeon Dr. Yordsberg.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Roger and Lana's marriage is rocky at best. Lana plots for her lover to kill Roger while he is away for the night on business so that she can have all of his money.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: While driving, David tells his wife Laura that he wants a divorce. Laura becomes hysterical and begins to cry and hit him. Trying to fight off his wife's attacks, David loses control of the car and flies into an intersection.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jim, the hospital janitor, teaches Dr. Sloan some magic tricks. Jim is a whiz at magic and can nimbly manipulate a medallion between his fingers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: George, a schizophrenic homeless man, shows up on a beach prophesizing about death. The couple in the nearby beach apartment, Cynthia and Ethan, threaten to call the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Steve Sloan is hospitalized for injuries sustained in a high-speed car chase, he wakes in a haze and watches with a blurred vision what looks like another patient being stabbed by one of the medical staff in his room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Nurse Stacy Bradshaw tells Dr. Sloan about her skydiving escapades, and he politely turns down her extreme thrill-seeking invitation to come along.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dr. Travis catches Dr. Sloan in his office, settling in with a bowl of popcorn to watch a reality television show, "Hot House," a "Big Brother" and "Real World" type series.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Mark's friends Stanley and Tammy have decided to preview Tammy's new fashion line at their wedding.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At a spiritual retreat, Beth Scarburough confronts Father Dominick about his failed friendship with her husband, Matt. She pleads for him to make amends with his former friend.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Cocky medical student, Hunter Koskov, coerces his classmates, Max and Jenny, to experiment with each other by inducing "death."

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Amanda does a guest spot as a nurse on the soap opera, where she serves as a medical consultant. Star actress Thalia faints during a scene and is rushed to the emergency room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Julia Adams comes to Dr. Sloan for a check-up. She seems a little anxious. At the same time, a man comes running through the hospital and in one highly restricted lab, knocks over and breaks a test tube.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan questions old friend and newspaper baron Barclay about the security company.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dr. Simon Hodiak, a noted cardiologist, is a gambling addict. When his bookie strong-arms him to repay his debt of $60,000, Simon sells his Porsche.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Maureen Tate is ogling over her nephew, Casey, with sister Grace. Maureen panics when there is a knock at the door, and the man's voice declares he is the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Old man Oscar Hemmings is being wheeled into surgery. As he is pushed through the halls, he has his lawyer, Mr. Bendix, take the names of doctors and workers in the hallway.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's a pressure test with a difference. Each contestant has written their own pressure test recipe and has to create a dish to wow the judges. The least impressive dish will send its maker home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The judges reveal that each contestant's mystery box, contains four ingredients which they can barter with one another for. The top four dishes will see their makers cook for immunity tomorrow.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Today's immunity challenge sees four contestants compete in a MasterChef time auction. The more time they spend on buying ingredients, the less time they have to cook.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Today's challenge is all about texture. In round one contestants must cook a dish with the best crunch. Round two is all about a gooey texture. The least impressive gooey dish will send its chef home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The MasterChef contestants leave the kitchen for a week of off-site challenges. Teams must make two entrees and three mains for 50 diners. The least impressive team faces a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Helly Raichura, of secret dining venue Enter Via Laundry, sets tonight's taste test. Contestants who guess the least ingredients correctly must replicate the dish in an elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Today's ingredients are sourced by locals who grow fruit and vegetables in their back yards.The three most impressive dishes from today's mystery box challenge will cook in an immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Three contestants are told they must prepare 100 small plates each, consisting of five different dishes. Dishes are then colour-coded and served to the judges on a sushi train in this blind tasting.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 20
programme.desc: In today's take-away elimination challenge contestants must make a dish that will stand the home delivery test. Contestants have 90 minutes from the start of the cook to completed delivery.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Contestants learn that there will be a twist with every challenge this week, so they must think on their feet to survive another week in the MasterChef kitchen. Tonight two twists really stir the pot.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Contestants have three hours to complete a simply stunning Darren Purchese dish but in the final hour of the cook, a twist which no one could anticipate is thrown at the contestants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Contestants have 75 minutes to cook a dish using one or more of the eight ingredients in the mystery box. The contestants are pushed to the limit when a twist is delivered to their benches.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Katy Perry guest judges a very special Hot N Cold challenge to honour the iconic MasterChef theme song. The contestant with the best dish will find themselves safe from Sunday's elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Contestants are cooking off against the other contestant on their bench. The best dish from each bench will be safe, while the remaining contestants must cook in the elimination round.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Jo Barrett and Matt Stone from Oakridge Wines mentor today's service challenge with each team cooking a sweet or savoury menu. The team with the least impressive menu face tomorrow's pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Contestants must replicate chef Peter Gunn's Black Box from his restaurant Ides. The contestant with the least impressive dish will be going home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Contestants must create a vegan dish using at least one ingredient from the mystery box set by vegan chef, Shannon Martinez. The top four dishes will cook off in tomorrow's immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Tonight's immunity challenge is fought in two rounds. In one round contestants must create a delicious dish using instant noodles. The top two from round one must make a nostalgic and comforting dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Josh Niland of The Fish Butchery breaks down a kingfish for each of the contestants to choose a cut to cook with. The contestant with the least impressive dish will be going home.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In Survivor it's the mind game that will get you ahead, and our castaways will stop at nothing to make it through another night. Who will be sent to Tribal Council, and who will be plotting revenge?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Following a heated Reward Challenge, a secret night mission causes one tribe to question one of their own. With another Tribal Council looming, players must think quick in order to keep in the game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: With no clear alliances in the Heroes tribe, will Hayley fall victim to the winners curse?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's day 10 and unexpected alliances are formed. But it's not long before the cracks begin to show.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A Hero goes undercover in the Villains Tribe. But will they stay Heroes strong or turn to the dark side?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Survivor history will be made as the game is raised to a whole new level. And a jaw dropping Tribal Council leads to an all-out war, leaving one player's game decimated.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: After the most explosive Tribal Council ever witnessed, the Villains are in disarray. With alliances burnt to the ground, can anyone rise from the ashes?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A Survivor favourite brings a shocking twist that will flip the game on its head.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: 21 days into the game and the recent tribe swap is breeding fear and doubt amongst the new tribes.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Last night's tribal council has revealed cracks amongst alliances. Which players will take advantage?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The biggest blunder in Survivor history turns a player into public enemy number one. With no alliances left does he have any chance of survival?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Its day 26 and the OG Villains are on a high with the return of a much-loved ally.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The greatest end game is about to be unleashed. Can alliances reunite, as enemies collide?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A powerful force has taken over the game. But can old enemies be trusted? Will vengeance and betrayal blow the game apart?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The Vigilantes have taken over. Can the OG Heroes hang on for dear life?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 17
programme.desc: With the end in sight, the remaining castaways are desperate to do anything to survive. Will jealousy cost one castaway the game, or can they keep level-headed enough to make it through another night?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 18
programme.desc: With numbers dwindling, it's anyone's game to take out the title of Sole Survivor. When two castaways put their best moves forward, will their plan to win over the alliance work?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A Reward Challenge where the winner gets an overnight stay and delicious feast in the Survivor Spa has everyone salivating! Then, grab the popcorn, as it all goes down at an intense Tribal Council.

programme.title: 1 vs. 100 UK S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Dermot O'Leary is back in the first of a new series of this popular quiz show in which one hopeful contestant takes on 100 opponents in a bid to win serious cash.

programme.title: Limitless Win S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Married NHS workers, Will and Kathryn, are the first team to take on the never-ending money ladder.

programme.title: Limitless Win S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Zee and his dad, Tony, return to take on the Limitless money ladder.

programme.title: Limitless Win S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Sisters Sarah and Amy return to take on the Limitless Ladder.

programme.title: Limitless Win S1 Ep. 4

programme.title: Limitless Win S1 Ep. 5
