programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Amy introduces her new client Chloe to the group where Mark encourages her little cousin Joey to make a move with Lucy.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Will Arg and Lydia ever move in together? Or will it be Lydia’s mum Debbie or Arg himself who puts the breaks on it? We see just how painful a break up can be for Lauren.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Amy is on the lookout for a new assistant, but will see find anyone suitably glamorous enough? Kirk’s in a dilemma, but which way will he go? And Arg is on a mission, but is it a road to nowhere?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Will Amy’s new assistant Paloma make the right impression at the salon? Newly single Kirk throws a party, but who will take centre stage? And will Lauren’s culinary skills hit the mark when the Wrights descend for dinner?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Just as Joey is about to bite the bullet and ask out Lucy, he sees her flirting with Kirk instead leaving both him and Chloe confused.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Joey is still torn between Lucy and Sam and is determined to ask one of them out at Harry’s 17th birthday party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren G is raging when Mark suggests to her he starts a modelling agency and tries anything to mark her stamp on him.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Mark and Lauren G attend a wedding fair where it’s clear they both have very different ideas of the type of wedding they want.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The day of Mark and Lauren G’s big engagement party arrives and the guests are shocked at the scale of it comparing it to an actual wedding.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Joey has a proposition for Mick as he plans to be the face of one of the nights at Sugarhut

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mark thinks of a way of taking Arg’s mind off of Lydia so plans a game of tennis doubles with him.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia starts to wonder if Amy is the girl in the rumor who slept with Arg but Debbie assures her otherwise

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With Joey now taking over Essex with his club nights, Mark is determined to get back on the scene and reclaim his title.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Lauren G is infuriated to discover she isn’t invited to Mark’s pool party in case she makes the female guests feel uncomfortable.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is Jess’ 26th birthday party, which bring together new faces and old flames under the same roof

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey, Lydia and Debbie head to the local car boot sale to see if they can get any items for Lydia's new shop.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren P, Lauren G and Maria meet for a birthday breakfast. Mark and Mario cross paths at the gym. Mick and Kirk talk women post singles’ night…. Mick reveals he likes Maria.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Maria and Mick finally get friendly over a romantic dinner date. The twins model for Jess and show off their assets. Lucy shows off her curves. And Mario and Mark lock horns.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tension rises with Maria and Gemma over Mick. Mario turns up the heat on Lucy with a proposition but will it all go horribly wrong. Mark and Mario face up once again with Mark having a killer ace up his sleeve.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Gemma and Frankie reveal their body concerns in a moving heart to heart. Joey gives Kirk some interesting fashion tips. And a smashing time is had by all when the twins hold “Greek Night”

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Gemma takes Harry under her wing-mirror as she teaches Harry to drive. No bum notes for Chloe with her first consultation for her bottom implants. And Kirk hosts Karaoke night at the Sugar Hut ……with screaming success!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Joey hosts an unusual cockney/ animal themed party. Mario and Lucy cozy up and there's fun on the slopes!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Cara and Billi get ready for a night out on the town….Kirk and Joey style! Mark woos Sam and Mario show Lucy his Italian side.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Sam gets her feet under the Wright's family table during a cosy Sunday lunch and Arg tackles his body issues full on starting with his gnashers!|Mick and Kirk spend some quality father/son time bonding during a fishing trip.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lucy wonders whether she’s made a big mistake by giving Mario a free pass. Sam gets a surprise visitor and Mark, Jess, Gemma and Arg head to Boot Camp for fat-busting workouts and some intimate revelations!!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia finds out what happens at Bootcamp doesn’t necessarily stay at Bootcamp. Everyone gets in the ghoulish spirit for Halloween. Nanny Pat goes trick or treating and Sam and Billie host an action packed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's the morning after the night before and Lauren G and Sam are both reacting to "that kiss"

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In the season finale: Arg continues his quest for physical perfection and seeks fashion advice from none other than Mr Essex himself, Joey, with "interesting" results!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Frankie, Lauren Pope and Chloe discuss the highly topical PIP implants. Lauren reveals to the girls she has them. There's a new girl on the block that arrives with attitude and 'history'.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mario turns to his dad for some relationship advice as Lucy sheds tears. Jess and Gemma tap into their spiritual side. Lauren Pope spills the beans on a past royal relationship. Joey holds a poker night for Mick, Diags, Gemma, Mario, Chloe and Frankie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey and Diags attempt to cheer up Arg with a surprise outing, roller-skating in the park. Gemma celebrates her 31st birthday in true Essex style with a Hollywood themed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Joey and Diags persuade Lauren Pope and Georgina to go on a night out, Joey and Diags-style. Diags gets a crash course in personal grooming from the best in the business, Chloe Sims and she reveals her secret weapon in battling acne, nappy rash cream.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A reality drama based on the gorgeous and glamorous characters that live it large in Essex. Tonight ….. Will Kirk go through with his tattoo? Will Mark turn up for Lauren’s birthday party?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The uber glam world of Essex will act as the backdrop to the series: nail bars, wine bars, spray tans, flash cars, big watches – these people live it large and just can’t get enough drama into their lives.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1205
programme.desc: Gaz and Charlotte spend the night together, Chloe finally comes clean to Chantelle over what she gave Scott and it all kicks off. Plus there's one huge shock when Marnie returns. (S12, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1206
programme.desc: Chloe is buzzin' when a new lad arrives. Marnie goes mental when a girl of Aaron's turns up and it kicks off again when the newbie drops Scott right in it with Chantelle.(S12, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1207
programme.desc: Marnie necks on with new lad Marty to teach Aaron a lesson. Charlotte's got Chloe's back when it all kicks off between the girls. Gary and Charlotte end up in bed causing ripples. (S12, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1208
programme.desc: It's the final episode. Gary returns and drops a bombshell. Marty suffers an embarrassing problem with Chloe. Holly needs to make an all important decision, and there's a shock exit! (S12, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1301
programme.desc: The Geordies are back! After jetting off to Magaluf, Marnie and Holly are having issues while Marty opens up to Chloe. Things are going well until Chloe gets jealous and it all kicks off. (S13, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1302
programme.desc: At a boat party in Ibiza, Aaron drops the G-bomb on Marnie, and single Gaz is back when he pulls Chantelle. But how will Holly react when she finds out? And Chloe's plans don't go smoothly. (S13, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1303
programme.desc: Big boss Anna is fuming when the squad finally return from Ibiza. Marnie's plan to get Aaron's attention backfires and the couple reach crisis point when Nathan gets involved. (S13, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1304
programme.desc: Chloe gets jealous of Holly and Marty and kicks off. Scott receives some big news and there's a shock arrival which has huge consequences for Gaz and Chantelle. (S13, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1305
programme.desc: It's seriously awks between Sophie, Gaz and Chantelle. Aaron finally returns but Marnie isn't happy. Chantelle and Marty clash over Chloe. Nathan takes getting mortal to the next level. (S13, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1306
programme.desc: It's the morning after Chantelle's departure... Sophie gets some big news from boss Anna, Aaron ends up in an ambulance and Chloe goes all out to get over Marty at the pool party. (S13, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1307
programme.desc: Marty ends up in hospital after the beach party. Meanwhile, Boss Anna has some big news for Sophie, Nathan has an unusual plan to help Chloe, and Gaz comes to a decision over Charlotte. (S13, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1308
programme.desc: It's Holly's birthday and she gets a massive surprise when Kyle shows up. Marty goes in on Chloe but takes it too far. Meanwhile, Aaron and Marnie's relationship reaches breaking point. (S13, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1309
programme.desc: The Geordies reach boiling point... Marty tries to make it up to Chloe, but will she forgive him? And is there any way back for Aaron and Marnie after the previous night's break up? (S13, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1310
programme.desc: In the series finale Chloe and Marty get flirty again, but can they really stay just good friends? Kyle gets some big news from Boss Anna, but the fallout will change the family forever. (S13, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: It all kicks off when eight Geordies become housemates. Vicky can't decide if she prefers Jay or Greg, Greg wants to leave, and Holly, the only housemate in a relationship, is unfaithful.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Jay's aware that he's bitten off more than he can chew with Vicky, Charlotte fights off advances from Gaz, whilst Sophie gets the shock of her life when her parents turn up unannounced.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: It's Jay's birthday and Vicky's playing the dutiful 'girlfriend', Holly's boyfriend visits, Charlotte loses the battle to fight off Gaz and the house is rocked by a shock departure!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: With Holly gone, the atmosphere in the house takes a turn for the worse. Vicky and Jay fall out, Gaz plays away from home, and someone else tries to leave.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Holly makes a surprise return to the Geordie Shore house, but not before Jay and Gaz face their toughest work assignment at a working man's club. Anna pushes Vicky too far.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: There's no fairytale ending in the Geordie Shore finale. Gaz gives Charlotte some serious news, Jay and Vicky's relationship erupts in a shocking way, and Holly faces a car park altercation.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 150
programme.desc: The cast reunites along with their friends, family to unravel the truths of those involved and to talk about socks, chlamydia and the never ending parsnip.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 151
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore cast head to Magaluf for the summer hols. The lads quickly make up for lost time with the ladies, and tensions explode with Char and Gaz, resulting in the biggest Geordie bust-up yet!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 152
programme.desc: There's more Magaluf madness as the gang struggle to get along. Under the watchful eye of Charlotte and Vicky, Gary continues to charm the ladies, and Holly rocks another wet t-shirt contest!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Yes, it's time to 'get on it like a car bonnet'! Series 2 kicks off with two feisty new housemates joining the house... but will it be a warm welcome or a frosty reception? (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Charlotte is pushed to breaking point as lothario Gaz continues to pull anything in a skirt. Rebecca's feistiness intensifies as she faces competition to win one of the boy's affections... (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: There's no time to mourn Charlotte's departure as Vicky and Ricci's nocturnal spooning is interrupted by an unexpected visitor. Meanwhile, Gary and James are quick to get their kit off! (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: James continues his lucky streak with the ladies. Unlucky in love Sophie is played for a mug. Gary persuades Charlotte to return... but has she managed to get over him as she had hoped? (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: The 'cheer us all up' party ends in carnage as Charlotte tries to move on and the boys exchange blows. Vicky and Ricci make their relationship official with jaw dropping consequences... (S2, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte and Josh are in a great place, but they have a huge row on the day of his sister's baby shower. Charlotte arranges a night out. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Charlotte and Mel come face to face to try and resolve their differences. Josh invites Charlotte to Bolton for a big family dinner and Charlotte surprises her Mam by taking her on a trip. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Charlotte and her Mam head off to Iceland on a mission to save the whales. Josh decides to go on a big night out which leads to a huge row. Charlotte is left questioning their relationship. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Charlotte must devise a plan to save her and Josh from splitting. Charlotte travels to Manchester for Adam and Jamie's engagement party, but a sick night ends in a media storm. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: With their new schedule and a plan for their parents to meet, Josh and Charlotte are better than ever. But things take a turn for the worse when Charlotte attempts to surprise Josh. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: Josh's parents are staying over but will The Crosbys and The Ritchies get on? Charlotte suspects paranormal activity and turns to a medium and his dog. Mel's birthday ends in disaster. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: Will Charlotte and Mel resolve things in time for their trip to South Africa? Josh proves himself to be the ultimate hero when he rushes to Charlotte's aid after a terrifying accident. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: Charlotte plans a surprise to take her and Josh to a whole new level of love, but how will Josh react? Josh attempts to overcome his biggest fear to prove his love to Charlotte. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte tries to put a plan in place for having babies with Josh, but Josh thinks she's moving too fast and things go downhill. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: After a huge fallout about when to have a baby, can Charlotte and Josh save their relationship? Banana goes to the vets, and Lauren has an emotional surprise for Charlotte. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Charlotte has an embarrassing accident which results in a trip to the mattress shop. Charlotte must tell her mam and Lauren some big news about her and Josh, but how will they react? (S3, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh invite their parents for a weekend away, but will their families still get on after a weekend together in the Lake District? (S3, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh discover they will be travelling abroad for work, but an argument over a smoothie threatens to ruin the trip. Charlotte sees a consultant about her breast pain. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh head off to Brazil. But their romantic getaway turns sour after a series of arguments leaves Charlotte questioning the future of their relationship. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh's trip to Brazil ends in style with a helicopter date. When back in the UK, Charlotte heads straight into surgery for an operation to remove her breast implants. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Charlotte comes out of surgery after having her breast implants removed, but it looks like recovery will be slow and painful. It's Charlotte's birthday and she and Josh have a joint party. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: As Lauren Conrad juggles fashion school, a demanding internship and an unpredictable roommate who sabotages her work event, she learns quickly that everything is bigger in Los Angeles, including her problems.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren deals with the fallout of Heidi crashing the Teen Vogue party. When Heidi lands an interview for a 'dream job' that leads her to consider ditching school, permanently, Lauren realizes that she and Heidi may be on different paths.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sends Lauren on an overnight errand that lands her in New York City and returns to LA only to find a major surprise from her past waiting for her.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When an ex-boyfriend reappears in Lauren's life, she is surprised to see she might not be as over him as she thought. Meanwhile at her new job, Heidi asks if the price of paying her dues is worth the cost.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Lauren races home from an all-day Teen Vogue event to be with Jason on his birthday, but the night doesn't turn out as she expected. Audrina seeks Heidi's advice for her latest date with model/actor, Danny.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jason becomes a mounting distraction in Lauren's professional and academic life. Heidi finally gets her big chance to work in the nightclubs, but it couldn't have come at a worse time.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's the gang's first Holiday in LA and not everyone gets what they wish for. A New Year's kiss proves hard to come by for Lauren when Jason finds out she got an unexpected call from an old flame.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jason wants to make Lauren's 20th birthday special but when she lies to him about working with male models for a Teen Vogue assignment their relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Heidi finally decides she's had enough drama with Jordan. When she turns to the girls for advice, she realizes what she has to do to. With their fighting days behind them, Lauren and Jason think about taking things to the next level.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When Lauren's hard work at LA Fashion Week leads to a career opportunity of a lifetime, she is torn between her job and her boyfriend. Whitney says goodbye to LA for the summer, and Heidi and Audrina look forward to being single in the city.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After a rocky summer with her boyfriend Jason, Lauren decides to break it off and returns to Teen Vogue to face her unhappy boss. Heidi finds herself in trouble with a guy both she and Audrina are dating.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren goes on her first date since Jason and is tested at work when she's asked to work a fashion show. Heidi has a life changing secret she must tell her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When an uninvited Audrina shows up at Heidi's birthday, she learns Heidi's not ready to forgive and forget. Lauren, determined to focus on work, falls for the charms of the new guy in her life, Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Audrina tells Heidi about Spencer's cheating ways, but Heidi is doubtful - until she sees it for herself. Lauren continues to wonder whether she is ready for a relationship.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Heidi takes a break Spencer but finds herself missing him more than she'd like. Lauren has to plan a Teen Vogue dinner but takes a backseat to super-intern Emily from New York.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Lauren tells Heidi what she really thinks about Spencer, Heidi must choose between her best friend and her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren realizes she can't trust her best friends after Heidi hooks Jen up with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Audrina takes Lauren out on blind double date, while Lauren and Heidi grow farther apart.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Spencer asks Heidi to move in with him but Heidi doesn't know what to do or how to tell her roommate, Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lauren's 21st birthday is full of surprises when Heidi and Audrina throw her a party.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: With a new job on the line, Whitney stumbles in her biggest opportunity with Teen Vogue.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In this season finale, tension comes to a head as Heidi makes her final decision about moving in with Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lauren doesn't go to Heidi and Spencer's housewarming party.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Shane Evans, COO of Massage Heights, goes undercover to find the kinks in her company. One store's disregard for company policy rubs the Boss the wrong way. Can the boss of one of the largest massage chains in North America actually give a massage?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the series first, a Native American Boss goes undercover. Bruce "Two Dogs" Bozsum, Chairman of Mohegan Sun Casino, goes all in while undercover inside his Indian gaming empire. Does the Boss have enough gas in the tank to work the valet line?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Joe Didomizio, CEO of Hudson Group, goes undercover to find out if his company is still the "traveler's best friend." What happens when this travel king discovers turmoil in the terminals? Will working as a barista prove too hot to handle for this boss?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 13

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 18

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 19

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 21

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 22

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2801

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2802
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2803

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2804

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2806

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2807

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2808

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2809
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2810
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2811

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2812

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2814
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2815
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2816

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2817

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2818

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2819

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2820

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2821
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2822
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2823

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2824

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2825

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2826

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2827
programme.desc: After chasing down a suspect on foot, officers retrieve a fully loaded revolver from his pants, and police respond to a call about a man wielding a knife outside a bar.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2828

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2829

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2830

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2831

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency? S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In this episode, emergency services deal with drivers under the influence of drink, drugs, and even old age.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Payton Rule, struggles with mysterious weakness, that could one day paralyze her. 39yr old Travis Walker develops a mysterious bump on his hand it turns infectious and takes him to the brink of death.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Sadie Jones debilitating series of strange symptoms that threaten her life away. Harry Crowther is born healthy, his body begins a 6yr transformation his family searching for answers.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A large bump appears on 17yr old Matt Horick's body, his parents fear it's cancer, they learn is actually growing a second skeleton. 2yr old Haven Fowlers exhibits bizarre symptoms, can he be helped

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 1
programme.desc: 32 yr old Tanya Angus has never stopped growing and it took years before a physician recognized her condition. Kody Burns, doctors thought they understood exactly what he had, until he nearly died.

programme.title: Medical Mysteries S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A 12 year old who went from a high achieving healthy boy into a child who suffers extreme mood swings & severe body contortions. The family travels to the US in a search of a lasting cure for Cameron.

programme.title: Medical Mysteries S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: We meet the boy who feels like his blood boils when he steps outside. A woman, who suffers strange swellings on her face & body and a patient's search for answers to her constant dizziness.

programme.desc: Military crime is rising in Wiltshire, which is home to 15,000 Ministry Of Defense personnel. Squaddies and civilians often fight, and at least one serviceman or woman takes their own life each month.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 20

programme.title: ONE Born Every Minute UK S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At the Liverpool Women's, it feels like the whole city has arrived at once to have their babies.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S4 Ep. 11

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S3 Ep. 9

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This episode explores a troubling rise in domestic burglaries, from people caught stealing food to thieves targeting wealthy individuals. And a woman dials 999 when she hears someone in her house.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 7

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 24

programme.title: Medical Mysteries S1 Ep. 6

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S3 Ep. 7

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S3 Ep. 5

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 5

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 21

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Can Doctors help Kylie Monica who was born with life-threatening birth defects. 17yr old star athlete Michael Iniguez is fighting for his life, when a seemingly normal sore throat becomes deadly.

programme.title: Born Bad
programme.desc: Some deadly women become bad, while others are just born that way.

programme.title: Lethal Vengeance
programme.desc: A jealous girlfriend takes blood revenge, daddy's little girl become his killer.

programme.title: Blood Lines
programme.desc: A mother enlists her son to be her partner in crime.

programme.title: Episode 1
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent.

programme.title: Episode 2
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these Deadly Women chose a life of crime.

programme.title: Episode 3
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception.

programme.title: Episode 4
programme.desc: Apart, a woman and a man can be innocent, safe to society.

programme.title: Episode 5
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, so often it ends in divorce.

programme.title: Episode 6
programme.desc: To the Master Manipulator we are all just the pawns in their game.

programme.title: Episode 7
programme.desc: Women who kill husbands, lovers, rivals and parents will shock society.

programme.title: Episode 8
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality.

programme.title: Episode 9
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments on convicted killers are reserved for those who premeditate murder.

programme.title: Episode 10
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings.

programme.title: Episode 11
programme.desc: Deadly Women are not the women you expect.

programme.title: Episode 12
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind, and love can be deadly.

programme.title: Episode 13
programme.desc: Teenage girls are being scolded by their parents, only to respond with tears and a slammed bedroom door.

programme.title: Episode 14
programme.desc: Young love can be a beautiful time but when jealousy raises its ugly head it can also be deadly.

programme.title: Episode 15
programme.desc: To the outside world their marriages seemed happy. They were loving parents living comfortable lives.

programme.title: Episode 16
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes.

programme.title: Episode 1
programme.desc: In Texas, glamourous mother Darlie reports a vicious intruder attack that has left two of her young sons dead. When detectives begin their investigation, there are suspicions about how true her story is.

programme.title: Episode 2
programme.desc: Crips gang leader Christina and her crew murder a young woman in a ritualistic initiation ceremony. Plus, a wife pushes her sadistic sexual fantasies to the limit.

programme.title: Episode 3
programme.desc: Discovering why Sunday school teacher Melissa raped and killed her neighbour's little daughter and how Tiffany persuaded her lover to bury an elderly couple alive.

programme.title: Episode 5
programme.desc: How did Queen Poisoner Lydia murder three husbands and seven children; why did granny Velma slaughter her husbands and friends; and did Paula kill her daughters?

programme.title: Episode 6
programme.desc: An exploration of why bank robber Marjorie kills a pizza delivery boy with a pipe bomb; why Kim strangles a couple to death instead of paying back the $300 she owes them.

programme.title: Episode 7
programme.desc: An examination of what prompts Amber to shoot her husband in the head; how Kate disposes of her elderly employer's body; why Wendi murdered her terminally ill husband.

programme.title: Episode 8
programme.desc: What happens when a bride loves money more than her groom? Discover how Josephine convinced her lovers to commit murder and why con artist Elisa poisoned her husband.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S2 Ep. 3

programme.title: Declassified S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A Taliban double agent was instrumental in securing the release of foreign nationals held hostage in Afghanistan.

programme.desc: When Paul Snabel didn’t return home for over a week in November 1989, his flatmate became concerned and reported him missing.

programme.desc: Russian sleeper agents infiltrate the U.S. and begin living normal American lives.

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 7

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 3

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The FBI discovers a Hezbollah terrorist cell nestled in the suburbs of Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: This is the shocking story of Julie Paterson’s tragic murder and the gruesome details of the attack which shocked the local community and drove her partner to drastic measures.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When armed robbers launched a surprise attack on security guards in the process of restocking two ATMs in January 2002, they did so in broad daylight along a busy shopping strip just minutes from the heart of Melbourne.

programme.desc: President George W. Bush and the Joint Special Operations Command prioritise stopping violent Al-Qaida leader Abu Musab al-Zarqawi.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S3 Ep. 2

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The 2005 murder of Teresa Halbach shocks the central Wisconsin community. A grisly crime scene of her burned bones is discovered at the family auto salvage business of Steven Avery.

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The NSA and FBI work together to thwart an Al-Qaeda terrorist plot to blow up the New York City subway on the anniversary of 911.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Devastated father Keith Vincent retells the story of the sequence of events that led to his son Adam and the brutal murder at the hands of a notorious drugs gang.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A mother and her two children were found in their house brutally bashed to death.

programme.title: Declassified S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: A sophisticated terrorist organization of white supremacists attacks the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Convicted killer Jodi Arias whose case triggered a flood of public involvement and social media activity, this past April, Arias was sentenced to life in prison without parole.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Dutch citizen made U.S. headlines for his involvement in the disappearance of Natalee Holloway, as well as the murder of Stephany Flores Ramirez in Peru on the exact same day, five years later.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When the battered body of Darryl Lewis is found dumped outside an ambulance station, police began an investigation that would become one of the longest running in Queensland history.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When a murder is committed, you hope that the suspect is caught as quickly as possible, but the lack of evidence with Elaine Doyle’s murder meant that justice would not be served for several years.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Convicted killer Jodi Arias whose case triggered a flood of public involvement and social media activity, this past April, Arias was sentenced to life in prison without parole.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Devastated father Keith Vincent retells the story of the sequence of events that led to his son Adam and the brutal murder at the hands of a notorious drugs gang.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A mother and her two children were found in their house brutally bashed to death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 66
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The FBI Files S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The sun set on the Wild West long ago, but some people refused to notice. Claude Dallas was one of them. A wily trapper, Dallas typified the rugged individualism that forged this country. He went too far when he killed two game wardens in 1981.

programme.title: The FBI Files S3 Ep. 42
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 91
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 31
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental brain fingerprinting technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 81
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 63
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The FBI Files S4 Ep. 65
programme.desc: On the day before Thanksgiving, a mother discovered her ten-year-old son was missing from his school. When a child of separated parents disappears, investigators first look at the family and divorced parents often suspect each other.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 58
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 116
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The FBI Files S3 Ep. 46
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files S3 Ep. 49
programme.desc: New York City is not stranger to gang violence. But when a 12-year-old child was kidnapped, the gangs had crossed a line. Law enforcement raced to find the missing boy before it was too late.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 86
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 115
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 86
programme.desc: Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seemfrom slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 118
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: When a family was murdered in Arkansas, it seemed like an isolated event. But soon the crime was revealed to be part of an ever-widening circle of violence that defined a new age of domestic terrorism.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S5 Ep. 49
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 59
programme.desc: In September 2002, two men were found executed in a burning Mercedes in an upscale Hollywood neighborhood. What initially looked like a drug-related murder, turned out to be something entirely different, but the crime scene left little evidence to go on.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 38
